outages.boundary: N 56TH ST TO N 64TH ST AND E CHAPARRAL RD TO E INDIAN SCHOOL RD
outages.comments: An underground power cable has failed. SRP crews are working to restore power.

outages.boundary: N BLACK CANYON HWY TO N 19TH AVE AND W ORANGEWOOD AVE TO W MARYLAND AVE
outages.comments: Electrical equipment has failed. SRP crews are working to restore power.
